M-037.NAME: mobile-admin-console
M-037.owns: Compact mobile-first admin console for operational status, users, devices, payments, analytics summary, system health, and emergency device actions

exports.view-admin-mobile-overview: Dense service overview with health, users, subscriptions, revenue, VPN/system status, and urgent navigation
exports.view-admin-mobile-users: Searchable mobile user list with role, status, identity, last-login, subscription/payment, and device summary paths
exports.view-admin-mobile-devices: Compact device registry with user/device/status/signals fields optimized for phone scanning
exports.view-admin-mobile-device-actions: Block, unblock, rotate, and revoke device controls with explicit confirmation and feedback
exports.view-admin-mobile-payments: Compact payment/analytics status for revenue, subscriptions, referrals, and conversion signals

data-flows.DF-UI-ADMIN-OVERVIEW: Stats and system health render as a compact first-screen operator status surface.
data-flows.DF-UI-ADMIN-USER-SEARCH: Admin searches users and reads compact account rows without table-only mobile dependency.
data-flows.DF-UI-ADMIN-DEVICE-ACTION: Admin selects one device action, confirms the exact peer target, calls the existing endpoint, then sees refreshed status and feedback.
data-flows.DF-UI-ADMIN-PAYMENT-STATUS: Billing and analytics status stays reachable from mobile navigation without backend/provider changes.

constraints.constraint-1: Admin emergency actions must remain visible from phone navigation and require clear confirmation.
constraints.constraint-2: Mobile admin UI must avoid desktop-only tables, oversized dashboard cards, nested card layouts, and decorative hero sections.
constraints.constraint-3: Audit-sensitive actions must preserve existing backend audit behavior and show success/error feedback after mutation.
constraints.constraint-4: Device actions must target one peer/device and must not imply or trigger whole-account disablement.
constraints.constraint-5: Deploy/install scripts, backend business rules, and Phase-25 session handling are out of scope.

execution-notes.note-1: Phase-24 implemented compact admin shell, dashboard, users, devices, analytics, compact stat tiles, and compact admin CSS in frontend-admin.
execution-notes.note-2: Device actions now open an explicit confirmation surface before block, unblock, rotate, or revoke calls.
execution-notes.note-3: No backend API, deploy, install, docker, nginx, or billing provider changes were made.

phase-54-verification-design.surface-1: Mobile Matrix admin verification covers dashboard, users, devices, MTProto, servers, plans, and analytics at 360x740, 390x844, and 430x932.
phase-54-verification-design.surface-2: Smoke must prove no document horizontal overflow, bounded tables/lists, reachable search/filter/pagination, and confirmation-safe destructive actions.
phase-54-verification-design.surface-3: Phase-54 must keep admin screens compact and operational, not decorative-first.

phase-54-execution.surface-1: Phase-54 keeps dashboard, users, devices, MTProto, servers, plans, and analytics as compact phone-safe operator routes with bounded inventories and reachable primary actions.
phase-54-execution.surface-2: Device and MTProto disruptive actions retain confirmation surfaces above pointer-safe Matrix overlays.
phase-54-execution.surface-3: 2026-06-03: frontend-admin build and scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs passed the mobile route, bounded-scroll, and confirmation markers.

M-037.hotspot: H-024: Mobile admin console must keep emergency operator actions visible without desktop-only dashboards
